title: Watercolor Paint Pack with Wood Brushes 12 Washable Colors (1 Count (Pack of 36))
features: 36 FULL WATERCOLOR PAINT SETS - 36 High Quality Individual Sets with Cases and 12 Vibrant Classic Colors Including Black, Brown, Purple, Dark Red, Red, Dark Blue, Blue, Orange, Dark Green, Green, Yellow, White.

KID SAFE & WASHABLE Contains more paint per cup - 25% more paint (compared to the average competitor product)! All Color Swell Bulk Water Colors for kids contain Washable and safety compliant non-toxic paint that is perfect for age 3+, classrooms, students, parties, groups, donation, and adults.

BONUS WOOD BRUSHES 36 High Quality Wood Brushes Included in each set for Easy and Controlled Paint Application, mixing and blending paint colors for all creative art projects at home, school, crafting or in the classroom. EASY TO CLEAN Paint brushes wash out quickly of the washable kids paint, maintaining their shape with repeated use
BEST BULK VALUE Painting Supplies Set that is the Perfect Watercolors Bulk Paint Pack for your art and craft projects, classroom needs, school projects, and party favors or gift bags.
The Color Swell mission is to donate bulk colored pencils and other art supplies to kids in need, we couldn’t do this without PHENOMENAL CUSTOMER SERVICE.
description: Color Swell Bulk Watercolors feature 36 individual full sets of washable, non toxic watercolors each with 12 classic, vibrant colors ready to paint. Contains more paint per cup - 25% more paint! The 36 high quality wood brushes are perfect for groups of kids, adults, and students looking to learn watercolor painting. Our wood brushes hold paint perfectly, allowing for a controlled application and amazing paintings. - Vibrant color density offers easy blending. - Paint set lid flips for easy mixing tray. - Case is reusable and recyclable. Packaged in convenient hinged plastic box palettes, this pack of 36 sets is enough for any party, classroom, or individual looking to have extras for their next creative art project. Product has been approved to safety standards.
